description_long: This factory building complex consists of several interconnected and adjacent rectangular structures, each with flat or slightly sloped roofs. The main building is large, with a dark roof and light-colored walls, and is flanked by cylindrical silos and smaller utility buildings. The exterior features a mix of concrete, metal, and glass, with large industrial windows and multiple loading dock doors visible. Some buildings have attached annexes and connecting corridors, while others are standalone. The site includes visible piping and utility lines, suggesting active industrial use. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function.
description: A multi-structure factory complex with flat dark roofs, large industrial windows, silos, and visible loading docks, built from concrete, metal, and glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building, silos, and a row of adjacent structures with large windows and loading docks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the main building, the cylindrical silo, and the arrangement of smaller utility buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the main and secondary buildings, with visible annexes and connecting corridors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the long facades of the main and secondary buildings, as well as the layout of the smaller structures.
